title: Not Minecraft
description: Minecraft but MUCH less, Sucking the soul out of Minecraft itself!
body:
"Not Minecraft" Is what happens when you decide minecraft is to fun **with** features so this removes those for you while sucking the soul and life out of everything too!

One of the first but most likely many Funni Modpacks I'll make With such hot features like:
- No color!
- No dropping items!
- No dimensions!
- No hunger!
- Less sounds!
- No fog or water!
- Non Hostile mobs!

I haven't truefully tested if it's possible to even "beat" it or if half the features work cause it honestly made me feel awful playing it in creative so it works! (i think)

### This mod is no commentary on these mods themselves but rather a humorous idea.
